String.Source: Here you can choose the starting gear of your character. You will start by choosing a budget - or setting a custom one - and then spend that budget on a virtual trader selling goods from all the Settled Systems. You also have the option to get that starting gear for free if you want to keep the full budget. Current budget: <Global=RAS_CurrentBudget> Notes : - The vendor will update itself if you level up with the "Level Manager Activator" - The vendor will sell modded items if they were added to the vanilla leveled lists.
String.Dest:
这里可以设定你的角色起始装备。 你会先选择一个预算（也可以自订），然后用这笔预算向虚拟商人购买整个已开发星系中的物品。 如果你想保留全部预算，也可以选择免费取得起始装备。
目前预算: <Global=RAS_CurrentBudget> 注意事项: - 如果你使用「等级管理启动器（Level Manager Activator）」升级，商人的商品内容会自动更新。 - 如果模组物品有加入原版的等级清单，这个商人也会贩售那些模组物品。

String.Source: Here you can define a maximum and a minimum level for the location in which you will start. Maximum must be greater than minimum, so if you see few options in the minimum submenu it means you need to increase your maximum (and vice versa). Min Level: <Global=RAS_LocationMinLevel> Max Level: <Global=RAS_LocationMaxLevel>
String.Dest: 您可以在此定义起始位置的最高和最低等级。 最高级别必须大于最低级别，因此，如果您在最低级别子选单中看到较少选项，则表示您需要提高最高级别（反之亦然）。 最低等级: <Global=RAS_LocationMinLevel> 最高等级: <Global=RAS_LocationMaxLevel>

String.Source:
Here you can choose if your character has a place they call their own. You will not necessarily start here, but it's a possibility you have in the "Starting Location Terminal".
Selected home: <0.Name>
Note: you will get this home as an addition to the house you get from the "Kid Stuff" or "Dream Home" traits, not as a replacement.
String.Dest:
在这里，你可以选择角色是否拥有一个属于自己的居所。 你不一定会从这里开始游戏，但在「起始位置终端」中，可以选择这个选项。
选择房屋: <0.Name>
注意：这个房子不是换掉原本的房子，而是额外再给你一间。不管你有「孩子气」或是「梦想家园」特质已有房子，这个都是额外加的，而不是取代原本的房子。

String.Dest: 预设

String.Source: The Viewport
String.Dest: 观景港

String.Source: Broken Ship Start
String.Dest: 损坏飞船开局

String.Source: [DWN] Earth Dome
String.Dest: [DWN] 地球穹顶之家

String.Source: Your dream home
String.Dest: 梦想家园

String.Source: Your home
String.Dest: 你的家

String.Source: Akila Core Residence
String.Dest: 阿基拉城 核心区住宅

String.Source: Broken Ship Start
String.Dest: 损坏飞船开局

String.Source: Artifact ETA
String.Dest: 神器伊塔

String.Source: Neon Sky Suite
String.Dest: 霓虹城 天际套房

String.Source: The Well Apartment
String.Dest: 深井区公寓

String.Source: [DWN] VolII Hotel - Room 42
String.Dest: [DWN] VolII 饭店 - 42 号房

String.Source: At my Ship
String.Dest: 在我的船上

String.Source: Neon Sleeping Crate
String.Dest: 霓虹城 睡眠箱

String.Source: Disabled
String.Dest: 禁用

String.Source: [DWN] Paradiso Cabin
String.Dest: [DWN] 天堂小屋

String.Source: Random Scientific Outpost
String.Dest: 随机科学哨站

String.Source: Invitation to the Lodge
String.Dest: 群星小屋邀请

String.Source: Invitation to the Lodge
String.Dest: 群星小屋邀请

String.Source: Manage your Character Skills
String.Dest: 改变你的等级

String.Source: Select a Faction
String.Dest: 选择派系

String.Source: Choose a Home
String.Dest: 选择你的家

String.Source: Panel
String.Dest: 面板

String.Source: Choose Your Starting Location
String.Dest: 选择您的开始位置

String.Source: Select Narrative Adjustments
String.Dest: 选择叙述调整

String.Source: Change your Appearance
String.Dest: 改变你的外观

String.Source: Call Rescue
String.Dest: 唿叫救援

String.Source: Rescue Beacon
String.Dest: 求救信标

String.Source: I feel like I should keep this artifact, or at least not give it up freely.
String.Dest: 我觉得我应该保留这个神器，或至少不要轻易放弃它。

String.Source: You've been temporarily given the "Planetary Habitation" perk, as you may require it in order to build an outpost and a rescue beacon. Once you get off this planet (with the rescue beacon or another solution) the perk will be removed (or set back to the rank it was at before the crash).
String.Dest: 您已暂时获得“行星居住”特权，因为您可能需要它来建造前哨站和救援信标。 一旦你离开这个星球（使用救援信标或其他解决方案），该特权将被移除（或恢復到坠毁前的等级）。

String.Source: Here you can level up your character.
String.Dest: 在这里您可以提升您的角色等级。

String.Source:
Starting as a pedestrian in a random location can soft-lock you (your only escape would be to hijack an enemy ship, and you're not even sure there would be one nor it would be the right ship class).
Are you sure you wish to continue ?
String.Dest:
从随机位置的行人开始可能会将您软锁定（您唯一的逃脱方法是劫持一艘敌舰，而您甚至不确定是否有一艘敌舰，也不确定它是否是正确的船级）。
您确定要继续吗？

String.Source: Do you want to unlock the furniture in the New Homestead home right now ?
String.Dest: 您想立即解锁新家园的家具吗？

String.Source: The configuration you just did invalidated the choice you made at the <Alias=InvalidatedTerminal>. The selection has been reset to default.
String.Dest: 您刚才的配置使您在 <Alias=InvalidatedTerminal> 处所做的选择无效。该选择已重设为预设值。

String.Source:
Starting as a pedestrian in a starstation can soft-lock you as they may be no ship tech at the location.
Are you sure you wish to continue ?
String.Dest:
从星际站上的行人开始，您可能会被软锁定，因为该位置可能没有飞船技术员。
您确定要继续吗？

String.Source: You already called for a rescue ship, please wait for it to land.
String.Dest: 您已唿叫救援飞船，请等待其登陆。

String.Source: Impossible to find a landing point for the rescue ship. Please try again and if it doesn't work a second time, try to place this beacon in a flatter place.
String.Dest: 无法找到救援飞船的着陆点。请重试，如果第二次仍失败，请尝试将此信标放置在较平坦的地方。

String.Source:
You will be given the amount of caps required to unlock the vehicles feature. If you cancel the purchase, they will be taken back.
Beware: Unlocking vehicles is irreversible.
String.Dest:
您将获得解锁车辆功能所需的信用币。如果你取消购买，系统会把点数收回。
注意：解锁车辆是不可逆的。

String.Source: Factions will be available in an upcoming update.
String.Dest: 派系将在即将发布的更新中推出。

String.Source: The ship is damaged and won't start.
String.Dest: 飞船受损了，无法启动。

String.Source: Here you can set your character to a given level or you can reach a custom level by leveling up artificially.
String.Dest: 在这里，你可以将角色设定为指定等级，或者透过自行增加的方式达到自订等级。

String.Source: You installed another mod that edits the MQ101Debug global variable, most likely another alternate start mod. Mod is disabled. See the modpage for more information. If you doesn't find the incompatible mod in the "Incompatibilities" section of the mod description, feel free to report it in the comment section.
String.Dest: 您安装了另一个编辑 MQ101Debug 全域变数的模组，很可能是另一个替代启动模组。该模组已停用。请参阅模组页面以了解更多资讯。 如果您在模组描述的「不相容」部分中没有找到不相容的模组，请随时在评论部分报告。

String.Source: The ship is now ready to go!
String.Dest: 飞船已准备出发！

String.Source:
Here you can choose and customize a starting ship. You will access the ship technician dialogs as usual, except everything will be free.
If you don't choose a ship you'll start as a pedestrian and will have to buy one later on.
If you chose a ship and changed your mind, you can choose back the "ship" called "No Ship Selected" and you'll be a pedestrian again (it will be at the end of the list).
Beware, if you modify a ship and then change your selection, the modified ship will be reset.
If you level up using the "Level Manager Activator" the ship list will be modified accordingly.
String.Dest:
在这里，您可以选择并自订起始飞船。您将像往常一样访问飞船技师对话框，但所有内容都是免费的。
如果您不选择飞船，您将以步行者的身份开始游戏，之后需要购买飞船。
如果您选择了飞船后又改变了主意，您可以重新选择名为“未选择飞船”的飞船，然后您将再次成为步行者（该飞船位于列表末尾）。
请注意，如果您修改了飞船，然后又更改了选择，修改后的飞船将被重置。
如果您使用「等级管理器启动器」升级，飞船清单也会随之修改。

String.Source: What kind of new game are you willing to create ?
String.Dest: 您希望创造什么样的新游戏？

String.Source: Error! Impossible to teleport the player to the selected location. Please choose another.
String.Dest: 错误！无法将玩家传送至所选位置。请选择其他位置。

String.Source: Are you ready to start your new adventure ?
String.Dest: 您准备好开始新的冒险了吗？

String.Source: You don't have the required item(s).
String.Dest: 您没有所需的物品。

String.Source: You already chose a starting gear. Would you like to keep it and buy additional items or do you want to start anew ?
String.Dest: 您已选择起始装备。您想保留它并购买其他物品，还是想重新开始？

String.Source: I don't feel ready to go there...
String.Dest: 我还没准备好去那里…

String.Source: The ship list is still generating. Please wait a couple of seconds and try again.
String.Dest: 飞船列表仍在生成中。请等待几秒钟后重试。

String.Source: I showed the artifact to Maurice Lyon in New Homestead and he directed me to a group of explorer named "Constellation" based in the MAST district in New Atlantis. I should go there and show them my finding.
String.Dest: 我把这件神器拿给新家园的莫里斯·里昂看，他建议我去新亚特兰提斯MAST区，找一群名叫「群星」的探险组织。我应该去那里，把我的发现给他们看。

String.Source: I sold the artifact for a good amount, but I feel it's not the end of the story...
String.Dest: 我把这神器卖了个好价钱，但我觉得故事还没结束…

String.Source: The interferences were created by a strange artifact, I should find someone that can identify it or simply sell it.
String.Dest: 这些干扰是由一个奇怪的物品造成的，我应该找一个可以鑑定它的人或干脆把它卖掉。

String.Source: I have very strange interferences on my scanner, I should find what causes them.
String.Dest: 我的扫描器出现了非常奇怪的干扰，我应该找出导致干扰的原因。

String.Source: The ship's fully repaired and ready to fly. It's not perfect, but it'll get me off this planet.
String.Dest: 飞船已完全修好，随时可以起飞。它虽然不完美，但能带我离开这个星球。

String.Source: I’ve found what I need. Time to get the ship back in working order.
String.Dest: 我找到我需要的东西了。是时候让飞船恢復正常运作了。

String.Source: My ship's taken some damage and isn't flight-ready. If I want to leave <Alias=PlanetAlias>, I'll need to track down the right materials and carry out the repairs myself.
String.Dest: 我的飞船受损了，无法飞行。如果我想离开<Alias=PlanetAlias>，我需要自己找到合适的材料并进行维修。

String.Source: It turned out I got away from <Alias=PlanetAlias> without the help of any emergency ship.
String.Dest: 事实证明，我在没有任何紧急船只的帮助下逃离了<Alias=PlanetAlias>。

String.Source: I've boarded the rescue vessel and left <Alias=PlanetAlias> behind.
String.Dest: 我已经登上救援飞船，并离开了 <Alias=PlanetAlias>。

String.Source: A rescue ship has finally landed. My signal worked. If I can make it aboard, I'll be off this rock for good.
String.Dest: 救援飞船终于靠岸了。我的讯号成功了。如果我能上船，就能永远离开这块礁石了。

String.Source: The rescue beacon I built is broadcasting. It could take a while, but eventually someone should pick up the signal. I just have to hold out until help arrives.
String.Dest: 我建造的救援信标正在发出讯号。可能需要一段时间，但最终应该会有人收到讯号。我只需要坚持到救援到来。

String.Source: The rescue beacon is assembled. Switching it on will send a signal into space - my only chance for someone to find me. I should activate it now.
String.Dest: 救援信标已经组装好了。打开它会向太空发送信号。这是我唯一的机会。我现在就应该启动它。

String.Source: The outpost beacon is in place. Now I can set up the rescue beacon itself and get ready to send out a signal for help.
String.Dest: 前哨信标已就位。现在我可以设定救援信标，并准备发出求救讯号了。

String.Source: With the materials gathered, I need to claim a spot to build the beacon. Placing an outpost beacon will mark the area and give me a place to set up the signal array.
String.Dest: 收集到材料后，我需要找到一个地方来建造信标。放置一个哨站信标可以标记该区域，并给我一个设置讯号阵列的地方。

String.Source: Shipwrecked! The crash left me stranded on <Alias=PlanetAlias> with no working systems and no way to reach orbit. If anyone’s going to find me, I’ll have to make it happen. I should start searching the area for the materials to build a rescue beacon.
String.Dest: 飞船炸了！坠毁事件让我被困在<Alias=PlanetAlias>上，系统瘫痪，无法进入轨道。如果有人想找到我，我必须想想办法。我应该开始在附近寻找建造救援信标所需的材料。

String.Source: Barrett is back at the Lodge safe and sound. He's offered to join me on my travels in the future.
String.Dest: 巴雷特安然无恙地回到了陋室。他提议以后和我一起旅行。

String.Source: Barrett is free. I should take him back to the Lodge.
String.Dest: 巴雷特获救了。我应该带他回陋室。

String.Source: Matsura, the pirate captain, is willing to let Barrett go in exchange for a ransom. I need to figure out a way to free Barrett.
String.Dest: 海盗船长松浦愿意释放巴雷特以换取赎金。我得想办法救巴雷特。

String.Source: Heller survived, but Barrett has been captured by the Crimson Fleet again. I need to find him.
String.Dest: 海勒活了下来，但巴雷特又被深红舰队俘虏了。我要找到他。

String.Source: I have the coordinates that should take me to the pirate ship that captured Barrett and Heller.
String.Dest: 我有坐标可以带我找到抓了巴雷特和海勒的海盗船。

String.Source: I found a transmission from Barrett! Lin needs to hear about this.
String.Dest: 我找到了一条消息，来自巴雷特！我得把这个消息告诉林姐。

String.Source: Barrett is gone, captured by pirates. My only hope is that there might be some clue on where they went on the broken computer in the comms building.
String.Dest: 巴雷特不见了，被海盗抓走了。我唯一的希望是，也许能在通讯大楼里那台坏掉的电脑上找到他们去了哪里的线索。

String.Source: Argos Extractors is packing up operations on Vectera, but there's no word about Barrett. I need to go there and find out what happened.
String.Dest: 阿戈斯采矿公司正在停止在维特拉星的运营，但没有巴雷特的消息。我得去看看发生了什么事。

String.Source: I returned to the Lodge in this universe. Now, the search for the Artifacts continues.
String.Dest: 我回到了这个宇宙中的陋室，是时候继续寻找神器。

String.Source: I brought the Artifact to Constellation, and now they want me to join. Sarah Morgan, the Chair of Constellation, is asking me to come with her on a mission.
String.Dest: 我把神器带到了群星组织，现在他们想让我加入。群星组织的主席莎拉·摩根邀请我和她一起执行任务。

String.Source: I've been reborn in a new universe. I should head back to the Lodge and see if I can pick up the trail of the Artifacts.
String.Dest: 我在新的宇宙中重生。我应该返回陋室，看看能不能找到神器的踪迹。

String.Source: I met a robot just outside the Lodge and he invited me in. I should follow him.
String.Dest: 我在小屋外面遇到了一个机器人，他邀请我进去。我应该跟着他。

String.Source: Thanks to Maurice Lyon, the "Constellation" exploration group is awaiting my visit to discuss about the strange artifact I found. I should go to their headquarters in the MAST district of New Atlantis as soon as I can.
String.Dest: 感谢莫里斯·里昂，「群星」探险队正在等我，讨论我发现的奇怪文物。我应该尽快前往他们位于新亚特兰提斯MAST区的总部。

String.Source: I received a letter from a group of explorers named "Constellation". They are looking after artifacts like the one I sold and want to know about the circumstances of my finding. I should go to the Lodge in the MAST district of New Atlantis if I'm willing to help.
String.Dest: 我收到一封来自一群名为「群星」的探险组织来信。他们正在保管类似我卖掉的那件文物，并想了解我发现这些文物的情况。如果我愿意帮忙，我应该去新亚特兰提斯MAST区的小屋看看。

String.Source: The ship technicians gave me a letter from an organization named "Constellation". I should read it to find out what they want.
String.Dest: 飞船上的技术人员给了我一封来自「群星」组织的信。我应该读一读，看看他们到底想要什么。

String.Source: I defined who I am. I can now start my journey.
String.Dest: 我确定了自己的身分。现在我可以开始我的旅程了。

String.Source: When I'm done customizing my new adventure, I should go into the big orb at the center.
String.Dest: 当我完成我的新冒险的定制后，我应该进入中心的大球体。

String.Source: I need to choose where my adventure will begin.
String.Dest: 我需要选择我的冒险从哪里开始。

String.Source: I'm a miner for Argos Extractors on Vectera.
String.Dest: 我是 维特拉 上 阿戈斯採矿公司 的矿工。

String.Source: Placeholder
String.Dest: 佔位符

String.Source:
Hi <Alias=Player>,
You recently sold an artifact of great value for our small group of explorers. We are named "Constellation" and are thriving to resolve the mysteries of the universe and in particular the one tied to the artifacts like the one you found. If you're interested, we'd like to exchange with you about the circumstances of your finding and are willing to answer the questions you might have to the best we can. You can find us at "The Lodge" in the MAST District of New Atlantis.
Looking forward to a favourable reply,
Best regards,
Sarah Morgan, Head of Constellation
String.Dest:
嗨 <Alias=Player>,
你最近替我们这个小型探险团体卖出了一件非常珍贵的神器。我们是「群星组织（Constellation）」，致力于解开宇宙的种种谜团，尤其是那些与你发现的神器相关的秘密。
如果你有兴趣，我们希望能和你交流当时发现这件神器的经过，也会尽我们所能回答你可能提出的任何问题。你可以在新亚特兰提斯的 MAST 区域里的「群星小屋（The Lodge）」找到我们。
期待你给予正面的回覆。
群星组织负责人 莎拉·摩根 此致 敬上

String.Source: There is a museum on New Homestead. Its owner is probably the most informed on that kind of stuff in all the Settled Systems.
String.Dest: 新家园有一座博物馆。它的主人可能是所有定居星系群中最了解这类事情的人。

String.Source: I found a strange artifact while exploring, any clues what it is ?
String.Dest: 我在探索时发现了一个奇怪的神器，有什么缐索可以知道它是什么吗？

String.Source: I found a strange artifact, do you know any expert whom could identify it ?
String.Dest: 我发现了一个奇怪的神器，你知道哪位专家可以鑑定它吗？

String.Source: The name's Barrett. He's member of an exploration group named "Constellation". You will find them in a luxurious house in the MAST District of New Atlantis. I will warn them you're coming in. Tell Barrett it will be more expensive next time !
String.Dest: 他叫巴雷特，是一个名为「群星」的探索小组成员。你可以在新亚特兰提斯 MAST 区的群星小屋找到他们。我会提前告诉他们你要来。顺便提醒巴雷特，下次可就更贵了！

String.Source: Oh! I've seen this before. These anomalous gravitational signatures, it's very unique... I don't know much on what it is though, but I know someone that could surely help you.
String.Dest: 喔！这我以前见过。这种异常的重力特徵非常独特……我不太清楚那到底是什么，不过我认识一个人，他肯定能帮上你。

String.Source: Sure thing. We'll get it fixed up, good as new.
String.Dest: 当然。我们会修好它，让它焕然一新。

String.Source: I'm sure you can find something you like.
String.Dest: 我相信你会找到喜欢的东西。

String.Source: Sure, have at it.
String.Dest: 当然，随便尝试。

String.Source: I'm sure you can find something you like.
String.Dest: 我相信你会找到喜欢的东西。

String.Source: Let me see what ships you have for sale.
String.Dest: 你出售飞船吗？

String.Source: Let me see what ships you have for sale.
String.Dest: 你出售飞船吗？

String.Source: I'd like to view my vehicles.
String.Dest: 我想查看我的载具。

String.Source: I'd like to purchase a vehicle.
String.Dest: 我想购买载具。

String.Source: I'd like to view and modify my ships.
String.Dest: 我想查看和改装我的飞船。

String.Source: You're lucky the boss is so generous.
String.Dest: 老大很仁慈，你们运气不错。

String.Source: Matsura's in charge.
String.Dest: 这里松浦说了算。

String.Source: Got nothing to say to you.
String.Dest: 我对你没什么好说的。

String.Source: I enjoyed our conversation, but we're done. You all can go.
String.Dest: 和你谈话很愉快，但我们已经谈完了。你们都可以走了。

String.Source: Our business is concluded. See yourselves out.
String.Dest: 我们的交易已经完成了。慢走不送。

String.Source: He is free to go. I do not encourage you to return.
String.Dest: 他可以走了。我不鼓励你们再回来。

String.Source: You two take a moment to talk. We'll get to me.
String.Dest: 你们两个先聊一会，之后再说我的事。

String.Source: I believe you're here for Barrett?
String.Dest: 我想你是来救巴雷特的吧？

String.Source: Why don't you have a word with Barrett, first?
String.Dest: 你为什么不先和巴雷特聊聊呢？

String.Source: Can't wait to see if Noel's theory about the Artifacts was correct.
String.Dest: 诺维尔对于神器的理论究竟是否正确，我真想立刻一探究竟。

String.Source: After this, you're kind of a pirate aficionado. Too soon?
String.Dest: 这件事之后，你也算是个海盗迷啦。玩笑开早了？

String.Source: So... back to the Lodge?
String.Dest: 那么...回群星小屋？

String.Source: Well, uh... I can't say I feel too bad about you killing someone who kidnapped me and probably murdered a lot of people, but...
String.Dest: 呃……他绑架了我，而且可能还杀过很多人，你杀他我也说不上难过，但……

String.Source: You convince Matsura to let me go, and we'll be on our way.
String.Dest: 你说服松浦放我走，我们马上就离开这。

String.Source: It's not so bad here. Although I wouldn't mind if you could talk Matsura into letting me go...
String.Dest: 这里没那么糟，但我也不介意你说服松浦放我走……

String.Source: Something I can help you with?
String.Dest: 有什么要帮忙的吗？

String.Source: Can't believe Barrett snuck a transmission to us. He always finds a way.
String.Dest: 真不敢相信巴雷特居然偷偷传了条信息给我们。他总能找到办法。

String.Source: Good luck finding Barrett. Keep an eye out for Heller while you're at it?
String.Dest: 祝你能找到巴雷特。也帮我留意一下海勒好吗？

String.Source: Just don't get your hopes up, okay?
String.Dest: 只是别抱太大希望，好吗？

String.Source: I'm packing up. What a mess...
String.Dest: 我正在收拾东西。真是乱七八糟…

String.Source: You want to try fixing that computer, go ahead.
String.Dest: 你想试着修好那台电脑就去吧。

String.Source: You shouldn't be here. Leave me alone.
String.Dest: 你不该来这里。别管我。

String.Source: You should let us help you, there's no reason for you to have to suffer needlessly.
String.Dest: 你应该让我们帮你，你根本无需要承受那种痛苦。

String.Source: You sure about that? A med kit might do wonders for you? All right, your choice.
String.Dest: 你确定吗？医疗包可能会对你大有帮助？好吧，你说了算。

String.Source: It would seem prudent to accept any and all help offered to you right now.
String.Dest: 现在接受别人给你的任何帮助似乎要谨慎点了。

String.Source: And don't leave out any details.
String.Dest: 不要漏掉任何细节。

String.Source: Just focus, all right? Any detail may be important.
String.Dest: 集中精神。任何细节都可能很重要。

String.Source: As best you can recall, given your current state of mind.
String.Dest: 虽然你目前精神状态不佳，不过尽可能好好回想一下。

String.Source: Oh yeah. There's no certainty to the universe at all. Once you really start getting out there, the laws of physics kind of turn into suggestions.
String.Dest: 哦是的。宇宙中不存在必然。一旦你真正开始深入宇宙，物理学定律就会变成参考意见。

String.Source: You're pulling my leg again, right? What's the weirdest thing you've seen? No exaggerations this time.
String.Dest: 你又开始骗我玩了，对吧？你见过最怪异的东西是什么？这回不许夸大其词。

String.Source: Unicorn. Not kidding.
String.Dest: 独角兽，我没开玩笑。

String.Source: Hmm... Let me think...
String.Dest: 唔……让我想想……

String.Source: Holy shit. You actually found me.
String.Dest: 我的天，你真的找到我了。

String.Source: You go into the far reaches of space too tightly wound, your brain is just going to pop like a soda can.
String.Dest: 如果你带着太过封闭的思想进入遥远深空，你的大脑就会像易拉罐一样炸开。

String.Source: Okay, it was more of an extremophile in the vague shape of a horse, but my point still stands. You need an open mind out there.
String.Dest: 好吧，它其实是某种样子有点像马的嗜极生物，但这不影响我的论点。在宇宙里你思想得开放些。

String.Source: I'm here to take you home, Barrett.
String.Dest: 我是来带你回家的，巴雷特。

String.Source: Wait. The mythical mare with a magic horn thing? Come on. Was King Arthur riding on it too?
String.Dest: 等会，你指的是故事里那种长了魔法尖角的母马？得了吧，那上面是不是还骑了个亚瑟王？

String.Source: You know, it's actually been kind of nice. Matsura the Grim here is a great host.
String.Dest: 其实我在这待着感觉还挺好的。死神松浦待客非常热情。

String.Source: Yes. I don't know why, but yes.
String.Dest: 是的。我不知道为什么，不过是的。

String.Source: Well, you didn't need to worry too much. Matsura the Grim here is actually a wonderful host.
String.Dest: 哎，你不用太担心。死神松浦其实非常热情好客。

String.Source: Matsura the Grim here and I actually have a lot in common.
String.Dest: 死神松浦和我其实有很多共同点。

String.Source: Are you... friends? With the... pirate?
String.Dest: 你和他……成了朋友？和……海盗？

String.Source: Both escape artists. Been captured by SysDef myself plenty of times.
String.Dest: 我们都是逃脱专家。我被星防队抓到过好几次。

String.Source: No reason captivity should be unpleasant.
String.Dest: 监禁不一定非得让人难受。

String.Source: See, that's what I mean, Matsura. Real considerate.
String.Dest: 你瞧，我就是这个意思，松浦。你是个真正体贴周到的人。

String.Source: No sense letting people's last moments be unpleasant.
String.Dest: 不必让人在临终前还要受苦。

String.Source: See, that's what I like about you, Matsura. Real renaissance man.
String.Dest: 你瞧，所以我才这么喜欢你，松浦。你是个真正多才多艺的人。

String.Source: See, that's what I'm talking about. Relativity. We're all just creatures of the universe trying to get away from what's after us.
String.Dest: 你瞧，我就说嘛。相对论。我们都只是在宇宙中试图摆脱追捕的生物。

String.Source: I have enjoyed our time together, Barrett. But I can't just let you go, with nothing to show for it.
String.Dest: 我们相处的时光很愉快，巴雷特。但我不能两手空空地放你走。

String.Source: Is Constellation willing to pay ransom in exchange for this man's freedom?
String.Dest: 群星组织是否愿意支付赎金来换取这个男人的自由？

String.Source: This won't be the last time Barrett escapes the Crimson Fleet. He always gets away. You know that.
String.Dest: 这不会是巴雷特最后一次逃离深红舰队。他总能成功逃脱，你也清楚。

String.Source: I... uh... very well. Perhaps it would be best to just let Barrett go.
String.Dest: 我……呃……好吧。或许最好还是该放巴雷特走。

String.Source: [Pay <Global=NPCDemandMoney_Large> Credits] We'll pay. Here.
String.Dest: [支付<Global=NPCDemandMoney_Large>信用币]我们付钱。给你。

String.Source: You want me to end all this with nothing to show for it?
String.Dest: 你是要我两手空空地结束这一切？

String.Source: Hasn't Barrett been enough trouble? Just let him go.
String.Dest: 巴雷特这个麻烦还不够大吗？你就放他走吧。

String.Source: But neither of us are going, anywhere. We'll wait while you shore up your finances.
String.Dest: 但我们两个谁也不会离开这里。我们会等着你充分改善财务状况。

String.Source: I'm afraid your pockets are a little light.
String.Dest: 恐怕你钱不太够。

String.Source: Goodbye, Barrett. I have enjoyed our time together.
String.Dest: 再见，巴雷特。我们相处的时光很愉快。

String.Source: That settles that.
String.Dest: 成交。

String.Source: "We do have some insurance set aside for this exact problem."
String.Dest: "我们确实为这种问题做了一些保险。"

String.Source: Take your time. Neither of us are going anywhere.
String.Dest: 慢慢来，我们两个谁也不会离开这里。

String.Source: Very well. As a favor to the Fleet, I'll let Barrett go.
String.Dest: 很好。看在深红舰队的面子上，我会放巴雷特走。

String.Source: Ah, I had heard some rumors among the captains that we had a new hotshot...
String.Dest: 啊，我听说舰长之间有传闻，说舰队里新来了一位大能人……

String.Source: Release my friend, or I take this up with Delgado.
String.Dest: 放了我的朋友，不然我就把这件事告诉德尔加多。

String.Source: [Attack] You're a pirate. This only ends one way.
String.Dest: [攻击]你是海盗，这件事只会有一种结局。

String.Source: I'll be back later.
String.Dest: 我晚点再来。

String.Source: We do have some insurance set aside for this exact problem.
String.Dest: 我们确实为这种问题准备了专项保险。

String.Source: Does that mean you'll be paying me, Miss...?
String.Dest: 也就是说这位女士会付钱是吗，敢问芳名……？

String.Source: And we would appreciate it if you could spread the word in the Crimson Fleet that Barrett shouldn't be harassed. It's not working out for any of us.
String.Dest: 另外如果你能在深红舰队里宣传一下“大家不该骚扰巴雷特”，我们将不胜感激。骚扰他对我们双方都没好处。

String.Source: We don't need to be introduced. Here's your money.
String.Dest: 我们不需要相互自我介绍。这是你的钱。

String.Source: That's a fair point. But I can't control a man's reputation.
String.Dest: 你说的有道理，但我没法操控一个人的名声。

String.Source: Hmm... Very well. Goodbye to you all. I have enjoyed this little exchange.
String.Dest: 唔……很好。再见了各位。这次小小的交易非常愉快。

String.Source: Do what you can. A suggestion to the right ears can work wonders.
String.Dest: 你尽力就行。对合适的人施加心理暗示，有时能起到意想不到的效果。

String.Source: See ya around, Matsura. I mean... well, you know, hopefully not.
String.Dest: 再见，松浦。我的意思是……呃，你懂，再也不见。

String.Source: Enough. I must insist on payment for Barrett's release.
String.Dest: 够了。恐怕你们必须支付巴雷特的赎金。

String.Source: Barrett has some good friends, it seems. Very well. You're all free to go.
String.Dest: 看来巴雷特有一群好朋友。很好，你们可以走了。

String.Source: Well that was surprisingly easy.
String.Dest: 诶，没想到这么简单。

String.Source: Likewise, Matsura! Good luck with all the... you know, pirating...
String.Dest: 我也是，松浦！祝愿你的……呃，海盗活动……一帆风顺。

String.Source: It's been a real pleasure, Matsura. Really. Good luck out there with the... you know, hurting people and taking their money...
String.Dest: 我感到非常荣幸，松浦。真的。祝愿你的……呃，伤人越货事业……一帆风顺。

String.Source: From the hands of one Crimson Fleet pirate to yet another. And this time, that pirate is IN Constellation. Wonders never cease...
String.Dest: 从深红舰队的一个海盗到另一个海盗手里。而这次这个海盗，居然是群星的一员。神奇的事真是接二连三……

String.Source: Of course Barrett isn't in any danger. Why am I not surprised?
String.Dest: 巴雷特就一点事没有。为什么我一点都不意外呢？

String.Source: Are you serious with this? I thought you were dead!
String.Dest: 你认真的吗？我还以为你死了！

String.Source: I've missed you too, Vasco.
String.Dest: 我也很想你，瓦斯科。

String.Source: Well, this is turning into a regular Constellation party, isn't it? Should've brought drinks.
String.Dest: 呃，这场面越来越像平常的群星派对了，不是么？早知道带饮料来了。

String.Source: And Heller's here! Will wonders never cease?
String.Dest: 海勒也来了！奇迹简直没完了啊？

String.Source: And Lin's here! Will wonders never cease?
String.Dest: 林姐也来了！奇迹简直没完了啊？

String.Source: Barrett is unharmed. The statistical probability of this scenario has once again defied all known mathematical models.
String.Dest: 巴雷特没有受伤。他受伤的统计概率同样有违所有已知数学模型。

String.Source: Now why did I get a feeling this is what we'd find? Good to see you, Barrett.
String.Dest: 我突然有种预感，这就是我们要找的东西。见到你真是太好了，巴雷特。

String.Source: I wish I could say this is the first time this has happened with Barrett. But, well, it isn't...
String.Dest: 我也希望这是第一次有这样的事发生在巴雷特头上，可，呃，并非如此……

String.Source: I do not understand. Is Barrett being held hostage, or not?
String.Dest: 我没搞懂。巴雷特究竟是不是人质？

String.Source: Why don't I stick around? Help you get adjusted to the weird corners of the universe?
String.Dest: 我留在你身边如何？帮助你适应宇宙里那些怪异的角落？

String.Source: You feel it a bit, can't you? Ever since I found the second one, had the visions. Being around them is just... comforting.
String.Dest: 你也有点感觉，对吧？自从我找到第二个神器，看到异象以后就有了。待在神器的附近就会让我感觉……很安心。

String.Source: Marvelous.
String.Dest: 太棒了。

String.Source: Traveling together sounds good to me.
String.Dest: 一起旅行，听起来不错。

String.Source: Looks like we're all done here. Time to head back to the Lodge?
String.Dest: 看来我们这里都完事了。是时候返回陋室了吧？

String.Source: Goodnight, Matsura. Guess you'll be pillaging in the great beyond now...
String.Dest: 晚安，松浦。现在你大概要到那边的世界继续烧杀抢掠了……

String.Source: You don't want to get dragged down in the gravity of my genius. I get it. Let me know if you change your mind.
String.Dest: 我的聪明才智就像个重力场，而你不想被它困住。那好吧，如果你改主意了就告诉我。

String.Source: I think it's better if we go our own ways.
String.Dest: 我觉得我们还是各走各的路比较好。

String.Source: Sorry for the wait, everyone! Got a little held up on Vectera.
String.Dest: 不好意思让各位久等了！我在维特拉星出了点事耽搁了一下。

String.Source: Well, some of us were...
String.Dest: 嗯，是我们中的一部分人……

String.Source: Barrett! We were worried sick.
String.Dest: 巴雷特！我们担心死了。

String.Source: Actually, Walter HAS been complaining about you more than usual, which is always a sign when he's worried.
String.Dest: 其实，最近沃尔特埋怨你的话比平时更多了，而他一担心别人就爱这样。

String.Source: I see what you did there, Walter. And I know you've been secretly crying into your piles of money just waiting for my return.
String.Dest: 我知道你什么意思，沃尔特。你“肯定”整天偷偷对着你堆积成山的钱以泪洗面，呆呆地盼着我回来吧。

String.Source: Ha! And to think the first Artifact was taking up dust on the library shelf. Now look at them all.
String.Dest: 哈！想当初第一个神器还在图书馆的架子上吃灰呢。现在再看看它们。

String.Source: Wait. Is that?
String.Dest: 等等，那是？

String.Source: You seem like a reasonable person. Cut your losses and let Barrett go.
String.Dest: 你似乎是个明事理的人。快点止损，放巴雷特走吧。

String.Source: Don't start, Khatri...
String.Dest: 别来这套，卡特里……

String.Source: I'm afraid that's not an option...
String.Dest: 恐怕这不是一个选择......

String.Source: Hmm. Worth considering...
String.Dest: 唔。值得考虑一下……

String.Source: Look, Barrett is more trouble than he's worth. A lot of pirates are already dead.
String.Dest: 听着，巴雷特是个扫把星。已经死了很多海盗了。

String.Source: All the more reason I need to make sure I'm compensated...
String.Dest: 那只会让我要求赎金的理由更充分……

String.Source: He does seem to be unusually skilled in that area...
String.Dest: 在这方面他确实显得异常熟练……

String.Source: If you wanted bloodshed, you would've attacked already.
String.Dest: 要是你想大开杀戒，那早就动手了。

String.Source: You clearly get along with Barrett. You're friends.
String.Dest: 你和巴雷特处得很好啊，都交上朋友了。

String.Source: Don't assume because I haven't pulled my gun, that I won't...
String.Dest: 别看我没掏枪，就以为我不会动手……

String.Source: Hmm. True...
String.Dest: 唔，确实……

String.Source: A ransom isn't about how much one gets along with the hostage...
String.Dest: 我和人质相处得怎样，和要不要赎金无关……

String.Source: He HAS been more entertaining than most hostages...
String.Dest: 他确实比大部分人质都更有意思……

String.Source: You were just laughing it up the whole time?
String.Dest: 你一直都是这样嬉皮笑脸的吗？

String.Source: Hey, you're underselling my harrowing escape from certain doom, here. A little charm goes a long way when the knives are out!
String.Dest: 嘿，你这么说是在贬低我逃脱绝境的超凡本领。危急时刻运用一点个人魅力会让你受益匪浅的！

String.Source: Who was that pirate, anyway?
String.Dest: 那个海盗到底是谁？

String.Source: You all right, Lin?
String.Dest: 你还好吗，林姐？

String.Source: Think I butted heads with his mentor once, years back. Had that same kind of "surprisingly hospitable" vibe.
String.Dest: 我可能在几年前和他的导师发生过冲突。他们都给人同一种“热情好客得出奇”的感觉。

String.Source: Matsura the Grim? Honestly, a pretty nice guy as far as pirates go.
String.Dest: 死神松浦？说实话，作为海盗来说他算是个相当不错的人了。

String.Source: I'm fine. In this line of work, you make do. Even when the worst happens.
String.Dest: 我没事。干这行，总得凑合着过。即使发生最坏的情况。

String.Source: Only managed to scrounge up one so far. I'm sure there's more around.
String.Dest: 目前我只找到一个，周围肯定还有更多。

String.Source: Don't see what good it will do since they're already gone, but fine. Here. You need any more, feel free to scavenge around.
String.Dest: 他们都已经走了，我不明白那有什么用，不过给你吧。如果你还需要其他东西，可以在附近随便搜刮。

String.Source: Got any more Power Cells?
String.Dest: 还有电池吗？

String.Source: I need a Power Cell to repair the comms computer.
String.Dest: 我需要电池来修理通讯电脑。

String.Source: I don't mind keeping Barrett as my guest, but I won't say no to credits.
String.Dest: 我不介意让巴雷特继续在这做客，但我也不会拒绝信用币。

String.Source: You are here to free your friend? Do you have the money?
String.Dest: 你是来这救你朋友的？钱准备好了吗？

String.Source: Have you reconsidered paying the ransom for Barrett?
String.Dest: 你重新考虑过给巴雷特付赎金的事了吗？

String.Source: So you must be the one Constellation sent to look after Barrett.
String.Dest: 所以你一定是群星派来看巴雷特的人。

String.Source: You're right. What happened here?
String.Dest: 你说得对。发生了什么事？

String.Source: That doesn't sound good.
String.Dest: 听起来不太妙。

String.Source: I sense their loss hit you even harder than you realized. You cared about them.
String.Dest: 我感觉到他们的死对你的打击比你意识到的还要大。你在乎他们。

String.Source: You think if you're strict with them, that they'll focus on the work. Give you a little distance if things go wrong. But you want them to win. Every boss does.
String.Dest: 你以为你对他们严格就能让他们专心工作，而且万一出了什么事还可以保持一点距离。但你希望他们能赢，每个老板都希望如此。

String.Source: You're right. You tell yourself you got deadlines. That the credits are what matter. But it's people doing the job, not machines...
String.Dest: 你说得对。你告诉自己有工期要赶，信用币才是最重要的。但干活的终究是人而不是机器……

String.Source: Pirates. We were right, they were tracking us. They attacked as soon as they saw the Frontier. Some of my dusties... They didn't make it.
String.Dest: 是海盗。我们猜得没错，他们一路跟踪我们。一看到我们就立刻开火。我的一些伙伴……撑不住了。

String.Source: Well, how could you have? You weren't here.
String.Dest: 你怎么会知道呢？你当时又不在。

String.Source: I'm sorry. I didn't know.
String.Dest: 抱歉，我不知道。

String.Source: I started steeling myself to go out fighting, then that idiot puts his hand on my shoulder and says "stay here, Lin. I got you."
String.Dest: 我都已经做好打到最后一刻的准备了，结果那白痴把手搭在我肩上，说一句 "林，你待在这就好。我罩你。"

String.Source: Anyway, I was pinned down behind some crates with Barrett. Bullets and laser fire everywhere. No smile on that damn carefree face of his, like he knew this was it.
String.Dest: 总之，我和巴雷特一起被困在了几个箱子后面，周围子弹激光乱飞。他脸上一点也没有他平时那副没心没肺的样子，就好像他知道时候到了。

String.Source: I know that talk. Suicide mission.
String.Dest: 我知道那是什么意思，他打算牺牲自己。

String.Source: And that's when they brought out Heller. *sigh*
String.Dest: 而就在那时，他们把海勒拽出来了。（叹气）

String.Source: Drags him out into the open at gunpoint and demands to talk "or else I'm going to demonstrate Newton's third law on this guy's temporal lobe."
String.Dest: 他们用枪指着海勒，把他拖到空地上，说要和我们谈谈，“不然我就要用这家伙的颞叶来展示一下牛顿第三定律”。

String.Source: Next thing I know, two of the pirates are dead, and he's got the third one in a headlock.
String.Dest: 等我回过神来，两个海盗已经死了，而他正死死箍着第三个海盗的头。

String.Source: This would be the part I would absolutely run away.
String.Dest: 如果是我，绝对会在这时逃走。

String.Source: It was going so well until that part.
String.Dest: 到那为止一切都很顺利。

String.Source: Tell me what happened.
String.Dest: 告诉我发生了什么。

String.Source: *sigh* I've lost a lot of people on this run. I just want to pack up.
String.Dest: *嘆气* 这次我失去了很多人。我只想把这边收拾好。

String.Source: You want to try it, go ahead, but the odds of them being alive even if you could find them...
String.Dest: 如果你想试着找找看就去吧。但即便你能找到，他们还活着的可能性也……

String.Source: They could have grav jumped anywhere. I tried pinging a transmission to the ship in the comms building before they left, but the pirates must've fried it.
String.Dest: 他们可能会重力跃迁到任何地方。在他们离开之前，我曾试图在通讯室里联系飞船，但海盗肯定是把电脑烧毁了。

String.Source: I need to find Barrett and Heller.
String.Dest: 我需要找到巴雷特和海勒。

String.Source: So you just stood around and did nothing. Boss of the year right here.
String.Dest: 所以你就呆在这什么也不做，真是年度最佳老板。

String.Source: And that's the last I saw of either of them.
String.Dest: 那就是我最后一次见到他们俩了。

String.Source: I didn't overhear everything, but after the ten longest seconds of my life, Barrett put his hands up and both of them ended up getting taken aboard the pirate ship.
String.Dest: 我没听清所有内容，但在我人生中最漫长的十秒过后，巴雷特举手投降了，然后他们两个都被带到了海盗船上。

String.Source: Even if we knew where they were... *sigh* I've lost a lot people on this run. I just want to pack up.
String.Dest: 就算我们知道他们在哪里…*嘆气* 这次袭击我失去了很多人。我只想收拾行李走人。

String.Source: And for your information, I ran straight to the comms room when they were flying away. Tried to see if I could reach them, but the computer is fried.
String.Dest: 另外告诉你，在他们飞离这里的时候，我第一时间跑去通讯室试图联系上他们，但电脑已经被烧毁了。

String.Source: Don't push it. I've lost people. People I KNEW, all right?
String.Dest: 别逼我了。我失去了一些人。我认识的人，好吗？

String.Source: Our clients need to know when operations start and stop. We handle the rest.
String.Dest: 我们的客户只需要知道什么时候开始和结束开采，剩下的全由我们处理。

String.Source: Too risky to put that in the message. Too much liability. You know how it is.
String.Dest: 在消息里提起那件事太冒险了，责任太大。你懂的。

String.Source: A courier said Argos was packing up. Why not mention the attack?
String.Dest: 报信的人说阿戈斯正在撤离，为什么不提袭击的事情？

String.Source: Not quite. Barrett is more dangerous than you might think.
String.Dest: 不完全是那样。巴雷特比你想得要更危险。

String.Source: Suicide? *chuckle* Naw. The guys is seriously tougher than he looks.
String.Dest: 自杀？ *轻笑* 不。这傢伙比看起来犟悍多了。

String.Source: For some, perhaps. Barrett is quite capable, all things considered.
String.Dest: 也许对别人是吧。但巴雷特样样精通，很能干。

String.Source: Not for them, anyway. Barrett is more dangerous than you might think.
String.Dest: 对于那些海盗来说是不太好。巴雷特比你想得要更危险。

String.Source: Barrett's fine. You might think he's just a wise ass, but he's got skills.
String.Dest: 巴雷特没事啦。你可能觉得他只会用脑子，但其实他功夫也不错。

String.Source: I do not know Barrett as well as some, but he seems quite confident in his abilities, and not without cause.
String.Dest: 虽然我不像某些人那样了解巴雷特，但他似乎对自己的能力相当自信，而且他有充分的理由。

String.Source: Are you joking, or are you just a coward?
String.Dest: 你是在开玩笑，还是说你就是个懦夫？

String.Source: What? I've seen you handle worse odds. Heck, we've done it together.
String.Dest: 什么？我见过你应付过更严重的情况。我当时就和你在一起。

String.Source: Your humor is ill-timed.
String.Dest: 你的玩笑有点不合时宜。

String.Source: Who are you?
String.Dest: 你们是什么人？

String.Source: Hold still. Let me patch you up.
String.Dest: 别动，我来给你包扎。

String.Source: You're on a lot of painkillers, but otherwise you're in surprisingly good health.
String.Dest: 你止痛药吃太多了，但除此之外你的健康状况好得出奇。

String.Source: Considering the spaceship wreckage, you mean? Yeah, well, you missed the worst of it. Pretty sure we ripped through all the emergency meds that were salvageable...
String.Dest: 你是说结合飞船的破损程度来看吗？是啊，你错过了最糟糕的部分。我非常肯定，我们已经搜遍了所有还能用的应急药物……

String.Source: Nah. Nah, I'll be all right. Just, you know, wasn't trying to move around too much with all the pain killers and nausea meds running through me.
String.Dest: 不不，我会没事的。我只是，呃，在我吃的那堆止痛药和晕船药缓过劲之前，不太想四处走动。

String.Source: That doesn't explain the crashed ship.
String.Dest: 那没法解释飞船是怎么坠毁的。

String.Source: I need to know what happened, Heller.
String.Dest: 我需要知道事情经过，海勒。

String.Source: Barrett was all: "Sorry, brother, I'll get us out of this. Trust me..."
String.Dest: 巴雷特一直说：“抱歉，兄弟，我会把咱俩救出去的。相信我……”

String.Source: Man, I was so terrified when I got pulled on board that pirate ship.
String.Dest: 哎，我被拖上那艘海盗船的时候简直吓坏了。

String.Source: Oh, I'm getting to that...
String.Dest: 哦，我正要说这个呢……

String.Source: So he had a plan then?
String.Dest: 所以那时他有计划吗？

String.Source: "Trust me" is my go to line when someone shouldn't trust me.
String.Dest: "相信我" 是我最常用的台词，尤其是在别人根本不该相信我的时候。

String.Source: Not... what you and I would call a plan, necessarily...
String.Dest: 这个……也不一定真算得上计划……

String.Source: And he shot something he shouldn't have...
String.Dest: 然后他打中了不该打中的东西……

String.Source: Yeah... I'm starting to see that...
String.Dest: 是的...我开始明白了...

String.Source: And he shot someone he shouldn't have...
String.Dest: 然后他打中了不该打中的人……

String.Source: I mean, I didn't think it would work, but they came in. All of a sudden, we were wrestling with two of them. Barrett reached for one of their guns...
String.Dest: 我是说，我本以为这计划没用，但他们真的进来了。一瞬间我们就和两个海盗扭打起来，巴雷特伸手去夺他们的枪……

String.Source: I just remember him shouting "This kid is a killer! How am I supposed to defend myself against these pearly whites? He's gonna bite my face off!"
String.Dest: 我只记得他大喊“这小子是个杀人犯！他要是用那口大白牙咬我可怎么办啊？他会把我脸都咬下来的！”

String.Source: He tells me we need to start pretending to fight each other. Trick the pirates into thinking they need to come in before one of us gets killed.
String.Dest: 他告诉我，我们要假装打架来骗海盗，让他们觉得必须得介入进来，免得我们杀掉对方。

String.Source: Crash like this. Looks like he smashed the flight controls completely.
String.Dest: 这样的坠毁，看来他是彻底打烂了飞行控制装置。

String.Source: Then he did the little... finger gun thing...
String.Dest: 然后他就……用手比划枪……

String.Source: "You missed the fun part, Heller! I mean, I go through all the trouble of saving your butt, and you weren't even awake to notice!"
String.Dest: 你错过了最有意思的部分，海勒！我是说，你昏过去了，甚至都不知道我费了多大的功夫救你！

String.Source: I blacked out, and when I came to, there he was. Smiling like it was just another day on the job.
String.Dest: 我昏过去了。等我醒来，他就在那里，脸上挂着平时的微笑。

String.Source: Bingo. Blasted the pilot right in the back, through to the flight console. Dropped orbit like a rock off a high-rise.
String.Dest: 说对咯。他从背后把飞行员和飞行控制台射了个对穿，然后飞船就像山顶落石一样掉下了轨道。

String.Source: But Barrett isn't here. I need to find him.
String.Dest: 但巴雷特不在这里。我需要找到他。

String.Source: Skip to the end, Heller.
String.Dest: 直接说结果吧，海勒。

String.Source: He really survived the crash without a scratch?
String.Dest: 坠机之后他真的完全没受伤？

String.Source: And then really, really less excited when Barrett said "it's okay, I got this..." He mumbled something to them, and then they were all gone.
String.Dest: 等巴雷特说“没事的，我来搞定……”的时候，我更是彻底兴奋不起来了。他和那些人小声说了点什么，然后他们就都走了。

String.Source: So I was real excited when a ship showed up. Then less excited when I realized it was a Crimson Fleet ship.
String.Dest: 所以当有飞船出现时我非常兴奋。然而等我意识到那是深红舰队的飞船，就没那么兴奋了。

String.Source: Oh, yeah. Probably should've talked about that first. Did I mention I'm on a lot of painkillers?
String.Dest: 哦，对，可能应该一开始先说这个的。我有没有提到我吃了很多止痛药？

String.Source: Well... no, I don't think so. I caught him holding his ribs a few times. Favored his left leg a bit, you know?
String.Dest: 嗯……不，我不这么认为。我有几次看到他捂着肋骨，还稍微处理了下左腿的伤势。

String.Source: The Crimson Fleet has him. Again...
String.Dest: 深红舰队又抓住他了……

String.Source: They took him? Why?
String.Dest: 他们带走了他？为什么？

String.Source: That was a long way of saying "pirates have Barrett."
String.Dest: 这么长的故事就讲了一句话：“海盗绑了巴雷特”。

String.Source: I was drifting in and out, but yeah. I think so.
String.Dest: 我当时不太清醒，不过是的，我想是这样。

String.Source: I was drifting in and out, but uh, I think I heard the word "ransom"?
String.Dest: 我当时不太清醒，但，呃，我好像听到了“赎金”？

String.Source: Yeah, you know, you're really the one who should be upset about all this... Me laying here half conscious? Real inconvenience...
String.Dest: 嗯，我说，你才是该为整件事头疼的人……躺在这半梦半醒的我，想必很碍事吧……

String.Source: Let's get you on your feet first.
String.Dest: 还是先帮你站稳吧。

String.Source: Got a signal from the ship before they grav jumped. Guessing it was Barrett. Haven't really been in a good... space to have a listen. Here you go.
String.Dest: 在他们重力跃迁之前我从飞船收到了一个信号，估计是巴雷特。我的……状况一直不太好，所以我还没听。给你。

String.Source: Sit tight. I'll come back for you later.
String.Dest: 先别动，我之后再回来找你。

String.Source: Let me know when you want to head out.
String.Dest: 你想要出去的时候就告诉我。

String.Source: Give me a minute. I think the worst of it is... yeah. I'll be all right. I'll be all right. Ready to wisecrack with the best of them...
String.Dest: 等我一会。我觉得最要命的是……对。我会没事的，我会没事的。准备好最有意思的俏皮话……

String.Source: Yeah. Just, uh, don't ask me to operate any heavy machinery for a while.
String.Dest: 好。只是，呃，暂时先别叫我操作重型机械了。

String.Source: I think Argos is probably going to write this whole thing off. Plus I'm ninety percent sure working for you would be safer. I hope...
String.Dest: 我想阿戈斯估计会把整件事一笔勾销。况且我有九成把握给你干活会更安全些。但愿如此……

String.Source: You'll let me know when you're heading out, right?
String.Dest: 你准备出去的时候会告诉我的，对吧？

String.Source: Think the worst of it is over... Yeah, actually... Feeling pretty good.
String.Dest: 我觉得最要命的部分已经过去了……嗯，其实……我感觉还挺不错的。

String.Source: Oh, uh, yeah. Okay... Cool...
String.Dest: 哦，呃，行。好吧……没问题……

String.Source: Shouldn't we get you back to Argos?
String.Dest: 我们不该送你回阿戈斯吗？

String.Source: Hey, uh, I should come with you, right? I don't think anyone else is coming...
String.Dest: 嘿，呃，我应该跟你走，对吗？我觉得不会再有别人来了……

String.Source: Heller! Are you all right?
String.Dest: 海勒！你还好吗？

String.Source: Yeah? Got anything?
String.Dest: 嗯？有什么发现吗？

String.Source: Guessing there wasn't anything on that old computer, was there?
String.Dest: 我猜那台旧电脑上没什么东西，对吧？

String.Source: You find anything?
String.Dest: 找到什么了吗？

String.Source: So, you actually get that computer working again?
String.Dest: 所以，你真的修好了那台电脑？

String.Source: Oh... hey Lin. Good to see ya again...
String.Dest: 哦……嘿，林姐。很高兴再次见到你……

String.Source: I found a transmission. From Barrett.
String.Dest: 我找到了一条消息，来自巴雷特。

String.Source: Okay, let me send you the location data embedded in the transmission. Find them, okay?
String.Dest: 好，让我把信息里附带的位置数据发给你。找到他们，好吗？

String.Source: Funny. Even knowing he's alive. I still never want to see him again. Heller, on the other hand...
String.Dest: 有意思，他居然还活着，我依旧不想再见到他。但海勒……

String.Source: What? Let me see that...
String.Dest: 什么？让我看看……

String.Source: Still checking things out.
String.Dest: 我还在做检查。

String.Source: Be a while before Argos comes to pick me up. I'll be here if you need me.
String.Dest: 在阿戈斯的人来接应我之前还有一段时间，如果你有需要可以来这里找我。

String.Source: Oh. Okay...
String.Dest: 哦，好的...

String.Source: Thanks Lin.
String.Dest: 谢了，林姐。

String.Source: I knew it! You care about them. You're a softy.
String.Dest: 我就知道！其实你在乎他们，刀子嘴豆腐心。

String.Source: Just get after them, okay?
String.Dest: 快点追他们去，行吧？

String.Source: Well don't start buying me stuffed animals for my birthday or anything, but yes, all right. I don't like seeing my people hurt. Even Barrett and Heller.
String.Dest: 你可别因为这个就送我毛绒玩具当生日礼物。不过是的，我承认。我不喜欢看到自己人受伤，即便是巴雷特和海勒也一样。

String.Source: Why don't you come with me?
String.Dest: 你为什么不跟我走呢？

String.Source: But it might not be a bad time to think about a career change after... all this. If you have room in your crew for an outpost supervisor, maybe we can talk.
String.Dest: 但在经历了……这些事情之后，可能现在正是考虑换工作的好时机。如果你的团队还容得下一个前哨站主管，也许我们可以谈谈。

String.Source: Not really cut out for... whatever it is people like you and Barrett do.
String.Dest: 我不太适合做……你和巴雷特这样的人从事的行当。

String.Source: What? Really?
String.Dest: 什么？真的吗？

String.Source: And hey, if you ever need a little extra help, I've been thinking about a career change lately. Maybe it's time to put Argos behind me.
String.Dest: 对了，如果你还需要人手，我最近在考虑换个工作。也许是时候该离开阿戈斯了。

String.Source: Wait wait wait! We're all citizens of the universe here! No one needs to die. Well, I mean, no one else...
String.Dest: 等会等会！大家都是宇宙公民嘛，何必拼个你死我活的！呃，就算已经有人死了……

String.Source: Listen to your friend. I am trying to be reasonable.
String.Dest: 听听你朋友说的，我正在试着讲道理呢。

String.Source: Fine. Let's talk about this ransom.
String.Dest: 好吧。我们来聊聊赎金吧。

String.Source: Yes. Let's.
String.Dest: 好啊，那就聊聊。

String.Source: [Attack] Draw your weapon. Or not. I don't care.
String.Dest: [攻击]掏出你的武器来。不掏也行，我不在乎。

String.Source: Very well.
String.Dest: 就此别过。

String.Source: Barrett's right. There are better ways of handling this than using violence.
String.Dest: 巴雷特说得对。我们有更好的处理方式，不用动粗。

String.Source: Maybe we don't antagonize the person holding Barrett hostage? Just a suggestion.
String.Dest: 也许我们不要激怒绑架巴雷特的人？只是我的一点建议。

String.Source: If Barrett prefers a non-violent solution, we should consider it.
String.Dest: 要是巴雷特不愿意动用暴力，那我们应该好好考虑下。

String.Source: I'm from Constellation. I went here to find Barrett.
String.Dest: 我是群星组织的人，来这里是为了找巴雷特。

String.Source: Oh! Before I forget, the Frontier - our main ship - should still be on Vectera. It got damaged during the gunfire so the pirates weren't able to steal it. I would bring some repairing stuff with me if I was to pick it up.
String.Dest: 喔！差点忘了，我们的主力舰「开拓号」应该还在维特拉。它在交火中受损，所以海盗没能偷走。如果我要去取回它，我会带一些修理工具。

String.Source: Oh! I thought you were some pirate coming back to kill me. Lucky me, right?
String.Dest: 哦！我以为你是回来杀我的海盗呢。我运气真好，对吧？

String.Source: Vasco. Identify.
String.Dest: 瓦斯科。请确认。

String.Source: Hi! Sorry to bother you, but I've been asked to transmit you a message. Here it is.
String.Dest: 你好！很抱歉打扰你，我受託给你捎个口信。给你。

String.Source: Join you? Just because I found this artifact?
String.Dest: 加入你们？就因为我发现了这件神器？

String.Source: Wait... there's something familiar about you...
String.Dest: 等等，你看着有点眼熟……

String.Source: Excuse me, this is a private...
String.Dest: 不好意思，这是私人……

String.Source: Everyone will be in the library. Just inside.
String.Dest: 所有人都在图书馆。就在这里面。

String.Source: If you're interested, perhaps we'll give you a chance to join us today.
String.Dest: 如果您有兴趣，也许我们今天会给您一个加入我们的机会。

String.Source: Welcome to constellation, stranger! The others are awaiting you inside, please follow me.
String.Dest: 欢迎来到群星，陌生人！其他人正在里面等你，请跟我来。

String.Source: Oh please. It's completely ridiculous. Easiest bet I'll ever win.
String.Dest: 拜托。这简直无比荒谬。我这辈子没打过这么好赢的赌。

String.Source: Scanning. Cross-referencing known employee records of our affiliated organizations. Please remain still...
String.Dest: 扫描中。与关联公司已知员工记录交叉对照中，请站好别动……

String.Source: You really think what I'm suggesting is so outlandish? All the phenomenon we see out in the stars, and what I'm saying is the most impossible theory?
String.Dest: 你真觉得我的观点是天方夜谭？我们在宇宙中见过那么多光怪陆离的现象，你却依旧觉得我的理论绝对不现实？

String.Source: You two keep going on like this, and I'm banning wagers. I'm serious.
String.Dest: 你们两个再这样我就要禁止打赌了。我是认真的。

String.Source: We'll play nice. Just a little friendly conversation, Sarah. That's all.
String.Dest: 我们不会欺负人的，只是友好地聊聊天，莎拉。没别的意思。

String.Source: Oh, this is just typical. She hands over our ship to some random thug who's trying to steal our belongings.
String.Dest: 唉，这还真是老套。她竟然把我们的飞船交给一个想抢我们东西的无名暴徒。

String.Source: Walter...
String.Dest: 沃尔特……

String.Source: We appear to have a visitor...
String.Dest: 我们似乎来了个客人……

String.Source: Why don't we start with you telling me what Constellation is?
String.Dest: 不如你先跟我说说群星组织是个什么东西？

String.Source: Welcome to Constellation. We have a lot to talk about.
String.Dest: 欢迎来到群星。我们需要好好聊聊。

String.Source: Who are you?
String.Dest: 你们是什么人？

String.Source: Hmm... Very well. This is a private organization dedicated to exploration. Space primarily, but also anomalies throughout the Settled Systems.
String.Dest: 唔……好吧。这里是一家致力于探索活动的私人组织。我们主要探索太空，但也会调查定居星系群中的异常现象。

String.Source: As far as we know, he could be building a gigantic bomb that will blew up as we finish.
String.Dest: 据我们所知，他可能正在造一颗巨型炸弹，等我们一完成就会引爆。

String.Source: Sarah Morgan. Chair of Constellation.
String.Dest: 莎拉摩根，群星的主席

String.Source: Walter...
String.Dest: 沃尔特……

String.Source: Oh, this is just typical. She hands over our ship to some random thug who's trying to steal our belongings.
String.Dest: 唉，这还真是老套。她竟然把我们的飞船交给一个想抢我们东西的无名暴徒。

String.Source: As far as we know, he could be building a gigantic bomb that will blew up as we finish.
String.Dest: 据我们所知，他可能正在造一颗巨型炸弹，等我们一完成就会引爆。

String.Source: But that's not gonna happen. They're here. With the artifact.
String.Dest: 但那不会发生。他们在这里，还带着那件神器。

String.Source: But that's not gonna happen. She's here. With the artifact.
String.Dest: 但那不会发生。她在这里，还带着那件神器。

String.Source: But that's not gonna happen. He's here. With the artifact.
String.Dest: 但那不会发生。他在这里，还带着那件神器。

String.Source: Thank you, Matteo. Now let's focus on what's in front of us, shall we?
String.Dest: 谢谢你，马蒂奥。现在让我们把注意力集中到眼前的问题上吧？

String.Source: Thank you, Matteo. Now let's focus on what's in front of us, shall we?
String.Dest: 谢谢你，马蒂奥。现在让我们把注意力集中到眼前的问题上吧？

String.Source: But that's not gonna happen. They're here. And not threatening us.
String.Dest: 但那不会发生。他们在这里，而且也没有威胁我们。

String.Source: But that's not gonna happen. She's here. And not threatening us.
String.Dest: 但那不会发生。她在这里，而且也没有威胁我们。

String.Source: But that's not gonna happen. He's here. And not threatening us.
String.Dest: 但那不会发生。他在这里，而且也没有威胁我们。

String.Source: What happened when it was extracted? Did anyone see anything? Hear anything?
String.Dest: 在取得神器的时候发生了什么？有人看到或是听到什么吗？

String.Source: It was bright lights and music.
String.Dest: 有亮光和音乐。

String.Source: Interesting. Similar to Barrett's description of the experience. With less embellishment...
String.Dest: 有意思。和巴雷特所说的经历类似，只是说法没那么浮夸……

String.Source: So something DID happen. Barrett mentioned a loss of consciousness last time he found an Artifact.
String.Dest: 所以确实是发生了点什么。巴雷特提过，他上次找到神器的时候失去了意识。

String.Source: I'm not talking about this. That thing almost killed me.
String.Dest: 不是说这个。那玩意儿差点要了我的命。

String.Source: There. Are you hearing this? Do you all believe me now?
String.Dest: 看吧。你们都听见了吗？现在你们相信我了吗？

String.Source: How many times has this happened? Who else has had these visions?
String.Dest: 这种事情发生过多少次了？还有谁看到了这些异象？

String.Source: Whether it happened or not wasn't in doubt. But honestly, Khatri, if you expect us to believe in fairy tales...
String.Dest: 问题不在于是否真的有人看到过异象。但老实说，卡特里，如果你想让我们相信童话故事……

String.Source: Right. Let's see...
String.Dest: 好的。让我们来看看……

String.Source: If this is the greatest mystery in the universe, why couldn't it be part of the ultimate mystery?
String.Dest: 如果这就是宇宙中最大的奥秘，那它怎么就不是终极奥秘的一部分？

String.Source: We know the Artifacts react to each other. The pieces we already have move when they're in close contact.
String.Dest: 我们知道神器之间会相互影响。我们现有的碎片在距离相近时就会自行移动。

String.Source: Now, if we add this new one to the two we already have...
String.Dest: 那么，如果我们把这个新的神器和现有的两个放到一起……

String.Source: Gentlemen, can we please focus?
String.Dest: 先生们，讲重点行吗？

String.Source: She's not the only one. If they're coming together, that means there's a set.
String.Dest: 不光是她觉得激动。如果它们能合为一体，那就意味着神器是成套的。

String.Source: Noel. I think it's time we tested your theory.
String.Dest: 诺维尔，看来是时候来检验一下你的理论了。

String.Source: Why? We're not sure yet. So if you wouldn't mind adding another data point?
String.Dest: 至于原因？我们还不确定。所以如果你不介意的话，再给点信息如何？

String.Source: We think it's anyone else who pulls one out of the rock for the first time.
String.Dest: 我们认为，最先将神器从石头中取出的人都会看到异象。

String.Source: The Artifact. If you could place it on the table here.
String.Dest: 那个神器，请你把它放在这张桌子上。

String.Source: After you. Here's the Artifact you found. If you could place it on the table here.
String.Dest: 你先请。这是你找到的神器。请把它放在这张桌子上。

String.Source: Built by an intelligence outside the Settled Systems.
String.Dest: 由定居星系群之外的文明打造。

String.Source: Easy, girl. Breathe. You'll have a heart attack.
String.Dest: 放松点，妹子。深呼吸。你这样是会犯心脏病的。

String.Source: Still two thousand credits for our little wager, Khatri?
String.Dest: 我们打的赌还是按两千信用币算吗，卡特里？

String.Source: You're on, Walter.
String.Dest: 没错，沃尔特。

String.Source: Oh my god. That's it. They're reacting! Look at how it's coming together.
String.Dest: 我的天。就是这样，它们起反应了！看，它们正在逐渐合为一体。

String.Source: That energy that's arcing between them? No manufactured material in the Settled Systems can do that! None of them! This proves that...
String.Dest: 看到它们之间那股跳动的能量了吗？定居星系里没有任何人造材料做得到！一个都没有！这就证明了...

String.Source: Not to take away from the moment, but, what are we going to do about our new friend here?
String.Dest: 我不是想转移话题，但我们打算怎么处理这位新朋友？

String.Source: That's it. Just like the others.
String.Dest: 没错，就像其他的神器一样。

String.Source: And to imagine we thought there were only two of them at first...
String.Dest: 起初我们以为神器总共只有两个，没想到……

String.Source: Well, if we had all the answers, it wouldn't be exciting, now would it?
String.Dest: 如果我们知道所有问题的答案，事情也就没意思了，不是吗？

String.Source: All right. I'm in. Tell me what happens next.
String.Dest: 好的，我加入。告诉我接下来该做什么。

String.Source: As to what they are? What they're building? Well, you'll be part of solving that puzzle now.
String.Dest: 至于它们是什么？它们能够组成什么？你现在也成了解答这些谜题的一分子。

String.Source: Individually, they're just odd hunks of metal. Another oddity from the uncharted reaches of space.
String.Dest: 它们单独存在时只是一些古怪的金属块，又是一种来自宇宙未知空间的古怪事物。

String.Source: You're a... I see... So, some of our theories about the Artifacts are correct.
String.Dest: 你是......我明白了......所以，我们关于神器的一些理论是正确的。

String.Source: Come find me when you're ready.
String.Dest: 等你准备好了就来找我吧。

String.Source: Fair enough, but you need a place to stay in the city, right? Why don't you settle in here? We owe you that much.
String.Dest: 没问题，但你在这个城市里需要找个地方住，对吗？为什么不在这里安顿下来呢？我们欠你太多了。

String.Source: Come find me when you're ready. You and I are going to be doing some traveling together. Get your feet wet.
String.Dest: 等你准备好了就来找我吧。我们两个需要去一些地方，带你熟悉一下。

String.Source: You should take some time to get settled in. Introduce yourself to everyone. Some of our members aren't here, but you'll meet them soon.
String.Dest: 你应该花些时间安顿下来，向大家介绍自己。部分成员现在不在这里，但你很快就会见到他们。

String.Source: This is all a little much. I need some time to clear my head.
String.Dest: 信息量有点太大了。我需要花些时间来理清思绪。

String.Source: *chuckle* So, are you ready to get to work? See if exploration is the life you want to lead in this little universe of ours?
String.Dest: *轻笑* 那么，准备开始干正事了吗？想探索看看是不是你想在这小小宇宙里过的生活？

String.Source: I see. It was months ago. So... why are you showing up now?
String.Dest: 我明白了。几个月前的事了。所以……你为什么现在才出现？

String.Source: How much do you know about the Artifacts? What are they?
String.Dest: 对于神器你了解多少？它们是什么？

String.Source: This appears to be the person who sold the Artifact.
String.Dest: 这看起来就是出售这个神器的人。

String.Source: You want me in Constellation? What does that mean? What's expected?
String.Dest: 你想要我加入群星组织？你是什么意思？有什么需求？

String.Source: Beyond that, you'll be expected to use your own judgement. Just like the rest of us.
String.Dest: 除此之外，你还需要运用自己的判断。就像我们其他人一样。

String.Source: We're all here because we're committed to exploring space. Humanity may have settled the stars, but that doesn't mean we should stop diving into the unknown.
String.Dest: 我们聚集在这里是因为我们都致力于探索太空。人类或许已经能够在不同的星球上定居，但这不代表我们该停止对未知的探索。

String.Source: One of our members, Barrett, went to another planet to assist an Argos Extractors mining operation - the same one he accidentally got into trouble with pirates earlier. So if they are a bit on edge, please forgive them. They're under a lot of stress.
String.Dest: 我们的一名成员巴雷特去了另一颗星球，协助阿戈斯採矿公司的行动，就是他之前不小心和海盗惹上麻烦的那个地方。所以如果他们现在有点紧张，还请见谅。他们正承受着很大的压力。

String.Source: In addition to credits, why don't we set you up with a backpack with some boost capability? You'll need it out in the field, anyway. Just mind your head.
String.Dest: 除了信用币，不如我们再给你的背包增加下飞行功能？野外探险的时候能用得上。只是小心别撞到头。

String.Source: And here. I think you've earned something for bringing the Artifact to us.
String.Dest: 谢谢你把神器带给我们，这是给你的奖励。

String.Source: Hmm... Interesting...
[Repeat Main Quest] I want to join Constellation. Unravel this mystery with you.
String.Dest: [重复主线任务]我想加入群星组织，和你一起解开这个谜团。

String.Source: You're taking their word for it? What if this person's just delusional?
String.Dest: 你相信他们说的话？万一这人只是妄想症患者呢？

String.Source: We probably know as much as you do at this point. As you can see, they're forming something now that we have multiple pieces. What it is, we'll have to find out together.
String.Dest: 目前我们知道的可能不比你多。如你所见，现在我们手上的多个神器开始融合成某种东西。而它究竟是什么，得由我们一起寻找答案。

String.Source: Why don't we hear them out? We know next to nothing. We have everything to gain if they're telling the truth.
String.Dest: 何不听听这家伙怎么说？我们啥都不知道，但如果这家伙说的是真的，那我们就赚到了。

String.Source: Why don't we hear him out? We know next to nothing. We have everything to gain if he's telling the truth.
String.Dest: 何不听听他怎么说？我们啥都不知道，但如果他说的是真的，那我们就赚到了。

String.Source: Why don't we hear her out? We know next to nothing. We have everything to gain if she's telling the truth.
String.Dest: 我们何不听听她怎么说？我们啥都不知道，但如果她说的是真的，那我们就赚到了。

String.Source: [Skip Main Quest] I'm not who you think. I'm Starborn. I know what the Artifacts are.
String.Dest: [跳过主线任务]我不是你认识的那个人。我是星裔，我知道神器是什么。

String.Source: I'm ready. Let's find out what these Artifacts are.
String.Dest: 我准备好了。来弄清这些神器的真面目吧。

String.Source: But... they still showed up, didn't they? Isn't persistence a signature trait for an explorer?
String.Dest: 但……他还是出现了，不是吗？坚持不懈不正是探险家的特征吗？

String.Source: But... she still showed up, didn't she? Isn't persistence a signature trait for an explorer?
String.Dest: 但……她还是出现了，不是吗？坚持不懈不正是探险家的特征吗？

String.Source: But... he still showed up, didn't he? Isn't persistence a signature trait for an explorer?
String.Dest: 但……他还是出现了，不是吗？坚持不懈不正是探险家的特征吗？

String.Source: Good. We'll set you up with a room. Take some time to meet everyone. Then when you're ready, you and I will be doing some traveling together. Get your feet wet.
String.Dest: 很好。我们会为你准备一间房。花点时间认识一下大家。然后等你准备好了，我们两个需要去一些地方，带你熟悉一下。

String.Source: You want this random thug in our organization? After getting lost the first time?
String.Dest: 你想让这个脑袋破洞的混混加入我们组织？他上次不是还迷路了？

String.Source: All right. Let's hear it.
String.Dest: 好吧，来说说看吧。

String.Source: You really don't know anything about the Artifacts?
String.Dest: 你真的对神器一无所知？

String.Source: Fair enough. We have a spare room you can use, and I'm sure everyone here would like a word with you. Once you're ready, come find me.
String.Dest: 没问题。我们有一间空房给你住，另外我觉得大家肯定都想和你聊两句。等你准备好了就来找我。

String.Source: If you're serious about wanting to be a part of this, then you have to know that we are diving headfirst into the unknown. There could be considerable risks.
String.Dest: 如果你真的想要参与其中，那你就必须明白：我们正在一头扎入未知的世界，会有相当大的风险。

String.Source: We're at the beginning of a very important discovery here. What you found: the Artifact. There's more, and they're creating something we don't understand yet.
String.Dest: 我们正处在一项极为重要的发现开端。就是你找到的那个...神器。还有更多，而且它们正在形成某种我们尚未理解的东西。

String.Source: Maybe I should get settled in first. Take a breather.
String.Dest: 也许我应该先适应一下，喘口气。

String.Source: Dusty! Snap out of it!
String.Dest: 土矿仔！醒醒！

String.Source: Any of this look familiar?
String.Dest: 这些东西看起来眼熟吗？

String.Source: You know who you are? New recruit for Argos Extractors? Ring any bells?
String.Dest: 你知道自己是谁吗？阿戈斯采矿公司的新员工？有印象吗？

String.Source: Come on. Come on. Okay. Take it easy. You were out cold. No physical damage. Mentally, the jury's still out.
String.Dest: 好了，醒醒，别紧张。你昏过去了。没有外伤。至于精神上嘛，还没下结论。

String.Source: Maybe later.
String.Dest: 那就再说吧。

String.Source: Who are you?
String.Dest: 你们是什么人？

String.Source: Let me guess. Another mysterious stranger in a spacesuit?
String.Dest: 我相信你一定能找到你喜欢的东西。

String.Source: Then explain it to me.
String.Dest: 那你解释解释。

String.Source: Yes?
String.Dest: 有事吗？

String.Source: I'm not interested.
String.Dest: 我没兴趣。

String.Source: Don't worry, we'll do the standard repair, refuel, and re-arm. Billed to Constellation's account. Gonna take a while, so give us some time.
String.Dest: 别担心，我们会进行常规检修、补充燃料和重整装备。账单计入群星组织的账户。这没那么快，请给我们点时间。
